location: Dropped by Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing, in the Erdtree Sanctuary building in Leyndell, Ashen Capital — accessible only after progressing the story through Crumbling Farum Azula.
tactics: His spell list changes based on which major demigods you've already defeated — expect borrowed attacks like Comet Azur, Rykard's Rancor, or Bloodboon depending on your progress.
Heavy jump attacks interrupt him mid-cast, and he's vulnerable to parries with a critical punish afterward.
Use the room's pillars for cover against his ranged spells, and be ready to dodge or shield through Comet Azur and Black Flame Ritual specifically — his two most dangerous attacks.
lore: Sir Gideon Ofnir's personal scepter, topped by a pearl meant to stand in for the whole world, the heavens, and a watching eye — a symbol for the many kinds of knowledge a person can chase but never fully possess.

builds.name: Intelligence Melee Hybrid
builds.why: Rare Intelligence scaling on a hammer lets a caster fight in melee without abandoning their stat spread, and Knowledge Above All strips enemy magic/holy negation for a burst damage window.
